*highlighted section* the side lengths of the rectangle are in the ratio 2:5, so the sides are 2x and 5x. *highlighted section* when all sides are extended by 9 cm, the new side lengths are 2x + 9 and 5x + 9. *highlighted section* the new ratio is 3:7, so we can set up the equation (2x + 9)/(5x + 9) = 3/7. *highlighted section* solving this equation gives x = 12. *highlighted section* the final side lengths are 2x + 9 = 33 cm and 5x + 9 = 69 cm. *highlighted section* the ratio of the side lengths is 33:69, which simplifies to 11:23. specialist
